title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. romieuxianum
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. romieuxianum, also known as the Hieracium or hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. romieuxianum include reducing fever, treating skin irritations, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional folk medicine.
